nodes.title: CAR structure mismatch - records stored in MST not CAR format

nodes.description: Reviewed all 9 harnesses + standalone_driver.cpp. Identified 10 concrete issues: 4 critical (MST discarded results, DB state persistence, lexicon loading, DPoP crypto bypass), 5 high-priority (HTTP error path, JWT verifier missing, MIME type hardcoded, CBOR offset variant, non-recursive walk), 3 lower-priority (touch fields, parameterized queries, chunk feeding).

nodes.title: C1: FuzzMST - Return Values Assigned & Traversed

nodes.title: C2: FuzzPDSDatabase - State Isolation via SAVEPOINT
nodes.description: Fixed persistent DB state that survived across iterations. Now wrap each SQL execution in SAVEPOINT fuzz / ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT fuzz, isolating each fuzzer input. Added explicit null checks for gFuzzDatabase.

nodes.title: C3: FuzzATProtoLexiconValidator - Lexicon Loading Fix
nodes.description: Fixed lexicon path: NSBundle mainBundle returns nil in CLI binary. Now loads from cwd-relative Lexicons/ directory. Switched to ATProtoValidationModeRequired (was Optimistic) and added multi-collection testing.

nodes.title: C4: FuzzDPoP - Crypto Verification + JWT Parsing
nodes.description: Added platform guard (#if __APPLE__). Now also parses DPoP proof as JWT (proof is just a JWT). Added verifyDPoP with different method/uri variations. Exercises JWT header/payload extraction path within DPoP verifier.

nodes.title: H1: FuzzHttp1Parser - Error Path + Chunk Feeding
nodes.description: Added [parser parseError] method call to exercise error-path state machine. Added chunk feeding test: split input in half, feed separately via two feedData: calls, tests incremental parsing. Checks parser.state machine progression.

nodes.title: H2: FuzzJWT - JWTVerifier + Base64URLDecode
nodes.description: Added JWTVerifier claims validation with expectedIssuer, expectedAudience, allowedAlgorithms. Reads all payload fields (iss, sub, aud, exp, iat, nbf, jti, did). Added base64URLDecode calls. Tests security-critical verification path and encoding utilities.

nodes.title: H3: FuzzMimeTypeValidator - Fuzz-Driven MIME Type
nodes.description: Fixed hardcoded forMimeType (@image/jpeg) — now uses fuzz-derived mimeType. Added isSupportedMimeType and sniffMimeTypeFromData calls. Tests multiple MIME types (png, gif, webp, mp4, pdf, etc.) against magic numbers.

nodes.title: H4: FuzzCBORDecoder - Offset-Based Decode
nodes.description: Added [CBORDecoder decode:input offset:&offset] call alongside simple decode. Tests streaming/multi-value decoding path with different offset boundary conditions. Touches type and all value accessors (simpleValue, floatValue, etc.).

nodes.title: H5: standalone_driver.cpp - Recursive Walk + DT_UNKNOWN Fallback
nodes.description: Changed non-recursive corpus walk to recursive directory traversal. Added DT_UNKNOWN handling: falls back to stat() when dirent.d_type is unknown (Linux filesystems). Now processes corpus subdirectories. Filters dot dirs to skip . and ..

nodes.title: L1-L3: Lower-Priority Improvements

nodes.title: OAuth2 Overhaul: Concurrency, Scalability, Provider Migration
nodes.description: Three-phase overhaul of the OAuth2 subsystem: (A) Fix race conditions and replace @synchronized, (B) Session persistence via OAuthProviderStorage, (C) Migrate from OAuth2Server to OAuthProviderServer

nodes.title: Phase A: Merge sPendingConsents + sPasskeyChallenges into single _oauthStateQueue
nodes.description: Replace 7 @synchronized(sPendingConsents) blocks and dispatch_sync(sPasskeyChallengeQueue) with single serial queue. Eliminates cross-locking deadlock risk. De-static both dicts to instance variables.

nodes.title: Phase A3-A4: Fix OAuth2Server race conditions + encapsulate activeSessions access
nodes.description: Wrap all unprotected activeSessions iterations in dispatch_sync(sessionQueue). Add revokeSessionByToken:clientID:completion: and introspectToken:clientID:completion: to OAuth2Server so OAuth2Handler never iterates activeSessions directly.

nodes.title: Phase B: Extend OAuthProviderStorage for sessions (not SessionStore)
nodes.description: Add session CRUD methods to OAuthProviderStorage protocol. Implement in PDSAuthStorage with in-memory + SQLite backends. OAuth2Server migrates from raw activeSessions dict to storage protocol. Single storage abstraction for the OAuthProviderServer migration path.

nodes.title: Phase C: Swap OAuth2Server backend in OAuth2Handler (not new routes class)
nodes.description: Add oauthProvider property to OAuth2Handler. Feature-flag which backend is active. OAuth2Handler keeps HTTP routing, consent UI, passkey flow. Only ~200 lines of business logic calls change. Avoids duplicating 3600 lines of HTTP/UI code.

nodes.title: Review and fix user's code changes (8 issues found)
nodes.description: Fixed: (1) ChatAuthManager deprecated NSURLConnection→NSURLSession, (2) thread safety for cached key properties with serial queue, (3) kty/crv validation in publicKeyFromJWK:, (4) getListFeed error swallowing restored, (5) duplicated MST loading extracted to MSTCacheManager class method, (6) notification prefs  aligned with ATProto lexicon, (7) PDSHttpServerBuilder OAuth demo/MST viewer defaults reverted to NO, (8) ChatServiceTests/ModerationServiceTests removal confirmed correct

nodes.title: ChatAuthManager JWKS fetch: NSURLSession with semaphore, serial keyCacheQueue, kty=EC + crv=P-256/secp256k1 validation
nodes.description: ChatAuthManager now verifies JWT signatures by fetching PDS JWKS. Key cache is thread-safe via serial queue. JWK validation ensures kty=EC and crv is supported curve. Falls back to stale key on fetch failure, returns 503 if pdsUrl configured but key unavailable, trusts proxy if no pdsUrl.

nodes.title: XrpcHandler proxy method allowlist: app.bsky.*, chat.bsky.*, tools.ozone.* only
nodes.description: isProxiableMethod: restricts atproto-proxy header routing to known proxied prefixes. Defense-in-depth: protected methods already blocked, but allowlist prevents future method additions from being accidentally proxyable.

nodes.title: ModerationService now tracks subject review state in moderation_subjects table
nodes.description: New table with subject_did, subject_type, review_state, last_event_id, updated_at. emitModEvent updates state via reviewStateForAction: state machine. getSubjectStatus and getSubjectStatuses query the table instead of returning hardcoded values. No backfill for historical events.

nodes.title: MST incremental loading: loadMSTFromRepoBlocksForDid:store:error: extracted to MSTCacheManager
nodes.description: Both PDSRecordService and PDSRepositoryService had identical 70-line methods. Extracted to MSTCacheManager class method. Reads commit block→extracts data CID→reads MST root block→deserializes CBOR. Falls back to full rebuild from records on failure.

nodes.title: ChatModerationService decoupled from AppView/PDS routing, stubbed in XrpcChatBskyActorPack
nodes.description: ChatModerationService removed from AppViewXRpcRoutePack, XrpcAppBskyMethods, XrpcChatBskyActorPack. Chat moderation endpoints now return stub responses. ChatRuntime binds to 127.0.0.1 only. Chat moderation lives in syrena-chat microservice.
